## File name / title
<!-- Example: ECUMaster ADU7 Rover V8 Track Dash -->

## Author / handle
<!-- Optional -->

## Manufacturer / platform
<!-- Example: ECUMaster, Link, Haltech, MoTeC, Aim, etc. -->

## Hardware / software target
<!-- Example: ADU7, PMU16, ECU Master Black, Link G4X, etc. -->

## Firmware / software version
<!-- If known -->

## File type
<!-- Example: Dash, CAN template, ECU base map, PMU config, display asset, documentation -->

## Description
<!-- What is this file for? What does it do? -->

## File contents
<!-- What files are included? -->

## Screenshots
<!-- Attach screenshots here if relevant -->

## Notes / dependencies
<!-- Fonts, icons, images, CAN databases, external assets, setup notes, warnings, etc. -->

## Rights confirmation
- [ ] I created this content myself, or I have the right to share it
- [ ] I understand this submission may be published under CC0 1.0 Universal
- [ ] I understand others may reuse, modify, and redistribute it without attribution

## File attachment
<!-- Drag and drop the file here -->
